name: Caramelized Onions in Flaky Pastry
recipeIngredient: 6 Tablespoons cold unsalted butter, cut up
recipeInstructions:
FLAKY CRUST
1. Cook breadcrumbs in the 4 tablespoons of butter until toasted and golden.
ONIONS
2. Cook onions until crisp/tender in a steamer over simmering water.
3. Saute onions in 6 tablespoons butter for 10 minutes, turning to coat all sides.
4. Pour in wine and beef broth. Add fresh ground pepper. Continue cooking until liquid is absorbed.
ASSEMBLY
5. Place onion mixture in partially baked crust. Sprinkle with chopped parsley leaves.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes. Let rest 10 minutes before serving.
DOUGH
1. Process flour, salt, 6 tablespoons cold unsalted butter, and 2 tablespoons vegetable shortening until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Add 2 tablespoons water and process until incorporated. If dough is too wet to handle, refrigerate for 30 minutes.
3. Remove dough from processor and shape into a flattened disc. Cover
4. Roll dough out large enough to fit into a 10-inch quiche or tart pan.
